summary: Route Overview Feature Testing Complete. Code review confirms correct implementation of showRouteOverview() functionality. Frontend web app loads without errors. Navigation mode UI (including Overview button) requires location permissions which are not available in web browser preview.

issues: Expected value to be of type number, but found null (non-blocking)
useNativeDriver not supported warning (cosmetic, JS fallback used)

critical_code_review_comments: NavigationPanel.tsx (line 220-226): Overview button correctly implemented with testID='navigation-overview-button', icon='scan-outline', onPress=onShowRouteOverview
index.tsx (lines 1309-1333): handleShowRouteOverview correctly validates viewMode, mapRef, isMapReady and injects JS to call window.showRouteOverview()

useNavigationMapHtml.ts (lines 542-569): window.showRouteOverview() correctly collects coordinates via getOverviewCoordinates(), creates LngLatBounds, calls fitBounds with padding:50, and pauses follow mode for 8 seconds
useNavigationMapHtml.ts (lines 146-159): Follow mode pause logic correctly implemented with followModePauseUntil timestamp and isFollowModePaused() check in velocity loop
Quick action buttons preserved: Overview (NEW), Call, Share, Reroute, Undo - no regression in existing buttons

code_verification.bounds_calculation: mapboxgl.LngLatBounds created from route coordinates in useNavigationMapHtml.ts lines 559-562

context_for_next_testing_agent: Route Overview feature implementation verified via code review. The NavigationPanel with Overview button only renders in navigation mode (viewMode='navigating'), which requires device location permissions. Web browser preview cannot trigger navigation mode without location access. Mobile testing would be needed to fully test the UI interaction. Code implementation is correct and complete.

feature_checklist.coordinates_collection: PASS - getOverviewCoordinates() collects from overviewRoute or liveRoute
